docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,320.00 FILED BY BOF COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT GALVEZ GARCIA, NAZARETH YUDETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-08-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE CHRISTOPHER CHANDLER. APPERANCES: PLAINTIFF BOF COMPANY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NAZARETH YUDETH GALVEZ GARCIA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA NOT REPORTED (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $200 SERVED JAN-15-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GALVEZ GARCIA, NAZARETH YUDETH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-08-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-08-2025BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF BOF COMPANY IS PRESENT AND REPRESENTED BY KRISS MIRANDA. DEFENDANT COMCAST CORPORATION IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOF COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALVEZ GARCIA, NAZARETH YUDETH $3,320.00 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,570.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KRISS MIRANDA, AGENT FOR LANDLORD FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOF COMPANY
